name: nepali-tithi-miti
description: Nepali calendar skill for Bikram Sambat dates, tithi, panchang, festivals, and AD/BS conversion.

interface.shortDescription: Nepali dates, tithi, panchang, and BS/AD lookup
interface.longDescription: Cache-first Nepali calendar support for Bikram Sambat dates, AD/BS conversion, Nepal-time today lookups, tithi, panchang fields, festivals, and Hamro Patro-style source extraction. Uses uv and nepali-datetime for deterministic conversion and avoids guessing panchang data.
defaultPrompt: Get today's Nepali miti and tithi.
Scrape Hamro Patro for today's panchang.
